title: His Supplication on the Day of Sacrifice and on Friday
alternateName: دُعَاؤُهُ فِي يَوْمِ الْأَضْحَى وَ الْجُمُعَةِ
fullText:
اللَّهُمَّ هَذَا يَوْمٌ مُبَارَكٌ مَيْمُونٌ

O God, this is a blessed and fortunate day,

وَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ فِيهِ مُجْتَمِعُونَ فِي أَقْطَارِ أَرْضِكَ،

within which the Muslims are gathered in the quarters of Thy earth.

يَشْهَدُ السَّائِلُ مِنْهُمْ وَ الطَّالِبُ وَ الرَّاغِبُ وَ الرَّاهِبُ

Among them are present the asker, the seeker, the beseecher, the fearful,

وَ أَنْتَ النَّاظِرُ فِي حَوَائِجِهِمْ

while Thou art looking upon their needs.

فَأَسْأَلُكَ بِجُودِكَ وَ كَرَمِكَ وَ هَوَانِ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ عَلَيْكَ

So I ask Thee by Thy munificence and generosity and easy upon Thee is what I ask Thee!

أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ

- that Thou blessest Muhammad and his Household

وَ أَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْمُلْكَ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ،

And I ask Thee, O God, our Lord -for Thine is the kingdom and Thine is the praise

لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، الْحَلِيمُ الْكَرِيمُ الْحَنَّانُ الْمَنَّانُ

there is no god but Thou,the Clement, the Generous,the All-loving, the All-kind,

ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ، بَدِيعُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ،

Possessor of majesty and munificence,Originator of the heavens and the earth

، مَهْمَا قَسَمْتَ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

whenever Thou apportionest among Thy faithful servants

مِنْ خَيْرٍ أَوْ عَافِيَةٍ أَوْ بَرَكَةٍ أَوْ هُدًى أَوْ عَمَلٍ بِطَاعَتِكَ

good, well being, blessing, guidance, works in obedience to Thee,

،أَوْ خَيْرٍ تَمُنُّ بِهِ عَلَيْهِمْ تَهْدِيهِمْ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ

or good through which Thou art kind to them by guiding them to Thee,

أَوْ تَرْفَعُ لَهُمْ عِنْدَكَ دَرَجَةً

or raisest them up a degree with Thee,

، أَوْ تُعْطِيهِمْ بِهِ خَيْراً مِنْ خَيْرِ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ

or givest them the good of this world or the next,

.أَنْ تُوَفِّرَ حَظِّي وَ نَصِيبِي مِنْهُ

that Thou givest me amply my share and allotment of it.

وَ أَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ بِأَنَّ

And I ask Thee, O God -

,لَكَ الْمُلْكَ وَ الْحَمْدَ

for Thine is the kingdom and the praise;

لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ

there is no god but Thou -

أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ

that Thou blessest Muhammad

عَبْدِكَ وَ رَسُولِكَ

Thy servant and Thy messenger,

وَ حَبِيبِكَ وَ صِفْوَتِكَ

Thy beloved and Thy selected friend,

,وَ خِيَرَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ

Thy chosen from among Thy creation,

وَ عَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَبْرَارِ الطَّاهِرِينَ الْأَخْيَارِ

and the Household of Muhammad, the pious, the pure, the chosen,

,صَلَاةً لَا يَقْوَى عَلَى إِحْصَائِهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ

with a blessing no one has strength to count but Thou,

وَ أَنْ تُشْرِكَنَا فِي

that Thou associatest us with

صَالِحِ مَنْ دَعَاكَ فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ

the most righteous of those who supplicate Thee today

مِنْ عِبَادِكَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ

of Thy faithful servants

،يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ

- O Lord of the worlds!—

,وَ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لَنَا وَ لَهُمْ

and that Thou forgivest us and them!

.إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ

"Surely Thou art powerful over everything" (3:26).

اللَّهُمَّ إِلَيْكَ تَعَمَّدْتُ بِحَاجَتِي

O God, toward Thee I aim with my need

وَ بِكَ أَنْزَلْتُ الْيَوْمَ فَقْرِي

and before Thee today I set my poverty,

،وَ فَاقَتِي وَ مَسْكَنَتِي

my neediness, my misery,

وَ إِنِّي بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ وَ رَحْمَتِكَ أَوْثَقُ مِنِّي بِعَمَلِي

for I have more trust in Thy forgiveness and Thy mercy than in my own works.

وَ لَمَغْفِرَتُكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ أَوْسَعُ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي

Thy forgiveness and Thy mercy are vaster than my sins.

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

So bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

، وَ تَوَلَّ قَضَاءَ كُلِّ حَاجَةٍ هِيَ لِي

and attend to the accomplishment of every need of mine through

بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَيْهَا

Thy power over it,

، وَ تَيْسِيرِ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْكَ

its easiness for Thee,

وَ بِفَقْرِي إِلَيْكَ

my poverty toward Thee,

وَ غِنَاكَ عَنِّي

and Thy freedom from need for me!

، فَإِنِّي لَمْ أُصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلَّا مِنْكَ

I will come upon no good whatsoever unless through Thee,

، وَ لَمْ يَصْرِفْ عَنِّي سُوءاً قَطُّ أَحَدٌ غَيْرُكَ

no one other than Thou will turn any evil away from me,

وَ لَا أَرْجُو لِأَمْرِ

and I have hope in none but Thee for my affair

آخِرَتِي وَ دُنْيَايَ سِوَاكَ

in the next world and in this world.

اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ تَهَيَّأَ وَ تَعَبَّأَ

O God, if anyone has ever arranged, made ready,

وَ أَعَدَّ وَ اسْتَعَدَّ

prepared, and drawn himself up

لِوِفَادَةٍ إِلَى مَخْلُوقٍ

to be received by a creature

رَجَاءَ رِفْدِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ وَ طَلَبَ نَيْلِهِ وَ جَائِزَتِهِ

in hope of his support and awards,

فَإِلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلَايَ كَانَتِ الْيَوْمَ

then today toward Thee, my Master,

تَهْيِئَتِي وَ تَعْبِئَتِي

is my arrangement, my making ready,

وَ إِعْدَادِي وَ اسْتِعْدَادِي

my preparation, and my drawing up

رَجَاءَ عَفْوِكَ وَ رِفْدِكَ

in hope of Thy pardon and support

وَ طَلَبَ نَيْلِكَ وَ جَائِزَتِكَ

and in seeking to attain to Thee and Thy prize.

اللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

O God, so bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

وَ لَا تُخَيِّبِ الْيَوْمَ ذَلِكَ مِنْ رَجَائِي،

and disappoint not my hope in that today!

يَا مَنْ لَا يُحْفِيهِ سَائِلٌ

O He who is not troubled by those who ask

وَ لَا يَنْقُصُهُ نَائِلٌ

and diminished by those who attain their desire!

فَإِنِّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً

I come not before Thee trusting

مِنِّي بِعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ قَدَّمْتُهُ

in a righteous work I have sent ahead,

وَ لَا شَفَاعَةِ مَخْلُوقٍ رَجَوْتُهُ

nor in the intercession of any creature in whom I have hope,

إِلَّا شَفَاعَةَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ

except the intercession of Muhammad and the Folk of his House

عَلَيْهِ وَ عَلَيْهِمْ سَلَامُكَ

(upon him and upon them be Thy peace).

أَتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً بِالْجُرْمِ وَ الْإِسَاءَةِ إِلَى نَفْسِي

I come to Thee admitting sin and evildoing toward myself.

أَتَيْتُكَ أَرْجُو عَظِيمَ عَفْوِكَ

I come to Thee hoping for Thy abounding pardon

الَّذِي عَفَوْتَ بِهِ عَنِ الْخَاطِئِينَ

through which Thou hast pardoned the offenders,

ثُمَّ لَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلَى عَظِيمِ الْجُرْمِ

while their long persistence in dreadful sin did not prevent Thee

أَنْ عُدْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِالرَّحْمَةِ وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ

from returning toward them with mercy and forgiveness!

فَيَا مَنْ رَحْمَتُهُ وَاسِعَةٌ

O He whose mercy is wide

وَ عَفْوُهُ عَظِيمٌ

and whose pardon is abounding!

، يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ

O All-mighty! O All-mighty!

يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ

O All-generous! O All-generous!

صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

وَ عُدْ عَلَيَّ بِرَحْمَتِكَ

return toward me through Thy mercy,

وَ تَعَطَّفْ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِكَ

be tender toward me through Thy bounty,

وَ تَوَسَّعْ عَلَيَّ بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ

and spread out Thy forgiveness upon me!

. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ هَذَا الْمَقَامَ لِخُلَفَائِكَ وَ أَصْفِيَائِكَ

O God, this station belongs to Thy vicegerents, Thy chosen,

وَ مَوَاضِعَ أُمَنَائِكَ

while the places of Thy trusted ones

فِي الدَّرَجَةِ الرَّفِيعَةِ الَّتِي اخْتَصَصْتَهُمْ بِهَا

in the elevated degree which Thou hast singled out for them

قَدِ ابْتَزُّوهَا

have been forcibly stripped!

وَ أَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّرُ لِذَلِكَ

But Thou art the Ordainer of that -

لَا يُغَالَبُ أَمْرُكَ

Thy command is not overcome,

وَ لَا يُجَاوَزُ الْمَحْتُومُ مِنْ تَدْبِيرِكَ

the inevitable in Thy governing is not overstepped!

كَيْفَ شِئْتَ وَ أَنَّى شِئْتَ

However Thou willest and whenever Thou willest!

وَ لِمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ

In that which Thou knowest best,

غَيْرُ مُتَّهَمٍ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ وَ لَا لِإِرَادَتِكَ

Thou art not accused for Thy creation or Thy will!

حَتَّى عَادَ صِفْوَتُكَ وَ خُلَفَاؤُكَ

Then Thy selected friends, Thy vicegerents,

مَغْلُوبِينَ مَقْهُورِينَ مُبْتَزِّينَ

were overcome, vanquished, forcibly stripped;

يَرَوْنَ حُكْمَكَ مُبَدَّلًا

they see Thy decree replaced,

وَ كِتَابَكَ مَنْبُوذاً

Thy Book discarded,

، وَ فَرَائِضَكَ مُحَرَّفَةً عَنْ جِهَاتِ أَشْرَاعِكَ

Thy obligations distorted from the aims of Thy laws,

وَ سُنَنَ نَبِيِّكَ مَتْرُوكَةً

and the Sunna of Thy Prophet abandoned!

اللَّهُمَّ الْعَنْ أَعْدَاءَهُمْ مِنَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَ الْآخِرِينَ

O God, curse their enemies among those of old and the later folk,

وَ مَنْ رَضِيَ بِفِعَالِهِمْ

and all those pleased with their acts,

وَ أَشْيَاعَهُمْ وَ أَتْبَاعَهُمْ

and their adherents and followers!

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

O God, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ

(surely Thou art All-laudable, All-glorious)

كَصَلَوَاتِكَ وَ بَرَكَاتِكَ وَ تَحِيَّاتِكَ

like Thy blessing, benedictions, and salutations

عَلَى أَصْفِيَائِكَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ

upon Thy chosen Abraham and the people of Abraham!

وَ عَجِّلِ الْفَرَجَ

And hasten for them relief,

وَ الرَّوْحَ وَ النُّصْرَةَ وَ التَّمْكِينَ وَ التَّأْيِيدَ لَهُمْ

ease, help, strengthening,and confirmation!

اللَّهُمَّ وَ اجْعَلْنِي

O God, and make me

مِنْ أَهْلِ التَّوْحِيدِ

one of the people who profess Thy Unity,

وَ الْإِيمَانِ بِكَ

have faith in Thee,

وَ التَّصْدِيقِ بِرَسُولِكَ

and attest to Thy Messenger

وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ الَّذِينَ حَتَمْتَ طَاعَتَهُمْ

and the Imams toward whom Thou hast enjoined obedience,

مِمَّنْ يَجْرِي ذَلِكَ بِهِ وَ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ

and one of those through whom and at whose hands this takes place!

آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ

Amen, Lord of the worlds!

اللَّهُمَّ لَيْسَ يَرُدُّ غَضَبَكَ إِلَّا حِلْمُكَ

O God, nothing repels Thy wrath but Thy clemency,

، وَ لَا يَرُدُّ سَخَطَكَ إِلَّا عَفْوُكَ

nothing repels Thy displeasure but Thy pardon,

وَ لا يُجِيرُ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَتُكَ

nothing grants sanctuary from Thy punishment but Thy mercy,

وَ لَا يُنْجِينِي مِنْكَ

and nothing will deliver me from Thee

إِلَّا التَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ وَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ

except pleading to Thee before Thee,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

so bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

وَ هَبْ لَنَا يَا إِلَهِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فَرَجاً

and give us on Thy part, my God, relief

بِالْقُدْرَةِالَّتِي بِهَا تُحْيِي أَمْوَاتَ الْعِبَادِ

by means of the power through which Thou bringest the dead servants to life

وَ بِهَا تَنْشُرُ مَيْتَ الْبِلَادِ

and revivest the dead lands.

. وَ لَا تُهْلِكْنِي يَا إِلَهِي غَمّاً

Destroy me not through gloom, my God,

حَتَّى تَسْتَجِيبَ لِي

before Thou respondest to me

وَ تُعَرِّفَنِي الْإِجَابَةَ فِي دُعَائِي

and givest me the knowledge of Thy response to my supplication!

وَ أَذِقْنِي طَعْمَ الْعَافِيَةِ إِلَى مُنْتَهَى أَجَلِي

Let me taste the flavour of well-being to the end of my term!

وَ لَا تُشْمِتْ بِي عَدُوِّي

And let not my enemy gloat over me,

وَ لَا تُمَكِّنْهُ مِنْ عُنُقِي

place not my neck in his power,

وَ لَا تُسَلِّطْهُ عَلَيَّ

and give him not authority over me!

إِلَهِي إِنْ رَفَعْتَنِي

My God, if Thou raisest me up,

فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَضَعُنِي

who is there to push me down?

وَ إِنْ وَضَعْتَنِي

If Thou pushest me down,

فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَرْفَعُنِي

who is there to raise me up?

وَ إِنْ أَكْرَمْتَنِي

If Thou honourest me,

فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يُهِينُنِي

who is there to humiliate me?

وَ إِنْ أَهَنْتَنِي

If Thou humiliatest me,

فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يُكْرِمُنِي

who is there to honour me?

وَ إِنْ عَذَّبْتَنِي

If Thou chastisest me,

فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَرْحَمُنِي

who is there to have mercy upon me?

وَ إِنْ أَهْلَكْتَنِي

If Thou destroyest me,

فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ

who is there to stand up for Thy servant against Thee

أَوْ يَسْأَلُكَ عَنْ أَمْرِهِ

or ask Thee about his affair?

وَ قَدْ عَلِمْتُ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ

But I know that there is no wrong in Thy decree

وَ لَا فِي نَقِمَتِكَ عَجَلَةٌ

and no hurry in Thy vengeance.

وَ إِنَّمَا يَعْجَلُ مَنْ يَخَافُ الْفَوْتَ

He alone hurries who fears to miss,

وَ إِنَّمَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى الظُّلْمِ الضَّعِيفُ

and only the weak needs to wrong.

وَ قَدْ تَعَالَيْتَ يَا إِلَهِي

But Thou art exalted, my God,

عَنْ ذَلِكَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً

high indeed above all that!

اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

O God, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

وَ لَا تَجْعَلْنِي لِلْبَلَاءِ غَرَضاً

make me not the target of affliction

، وَ لَا لِنَقِمَتِكَ نَصَباً

nor the object of Thy vengeance,

وَ مَهِّلْنِي، وَ نَفِّسْنِي

respite me, comfort me,

وَ أَقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي

release me from my stumble,

وَ لَا تَبْتَلِيَنِّي بِبَلَاءٍ

and afflict me not with an affliction

عَلَى أَثَرِ بَلَاءٍ

in the wake of an affliction,

فَقَدْ تَرَى ضَعْفِي

for Thou hast seen my frailty,

وَ قِلَّةَ حِيلَتِي

the paucity of my stratagems,

وَ تَضَرُّعِي إِلَيْكَ

and my pleading to Thee!

أَعُوذُ بِكَ اللَّهُمَّ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ

I seek refuge in Thee today, my God, from Thy wrath,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَعِذْنِي.

so bless Muhammad and his Household and give me refuge!

، وَ أَسْتَجِيرُ بِكَ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ

I seek sanctuary in Thee today from Thy displeasure,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَجِرْنِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household, and give me sanctuary!

وَ أَسْأَلُكَ أَمْناً مِنْ عَذَابِكَ

I ask Thee security from Thy chastisement,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ آمِنِّي

so bless Muhammad and his Household, and give me security!

وَ أَسْتَهْدِيكَ

I seek guidance from Thee,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ اهْدِنِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and guide me!

وَ أَسْتَنْصِرُكَ

I seek help from Thee,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ انْصُرْنِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and help me!

وَ أَسْتَرْحِمُكَ

I ask Thee for mercy,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ ارْحَمْنِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and have mercy upon me!

وَ أَسْتَكْفِيكَ

I seek sufficiency from Thee,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اكْفِنِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and suffice me!

وَ أَسْتَرْزِقُكَ

I seek provision from Thee,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ ارْزُقْنِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and provide for me!

وَ أَسْتَعِينُكَ

I seek assistance from Thee,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَعِنِّي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and assist me!

وَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا سَلَفَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي

I pray forgiveness for my past sins,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اغْفِرْ لِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and forgive me!

وَ أَسْتَعْصِمُكَ

I ask Thee to preserve me from sin,

فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اعْصِمْنِي

so bless Muhammad and his Household and preserve me,

فَإِنِّي لَنْ أَعُودَ لِشَيْ‏ءٍ كَرِهْتَهُ مِنِّي إِنْ شِئْتَ ذَلِكَ

for I will not return to anything Thou dislikest from me, if Thou willest that!

يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ، يَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ

My Lord! My Lord! O All-loving! O All-kind!

يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ

O Possessor of majesty and munificence!

صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ

Bless Muhammad and his Household,

وَ اسْتَجِبْ لِي جَمِيعَ

and grant me everything

مَا سَأَلْتُكَ وَ طَلَبْتُ إِلَيْكَ

that I ask from Thee, seek from Thee,

وَ رَغِبْتُ فِيهِ إِلَيْكَ

and beseech from Thee!

وَ أَرِدْهُ وَ قَدِّرْهُ وَ اقْضِهِ وَ أَمْضِهِ

Will it, ordain it, decree it, and accomplish it!

وَ خِرْ لِي فِيمَا تَقْضِي مِنْه

Give me good in that of it which Thou decreest!

وَ بَارِكْ لِي فِي ذَلِكَ

Bless me in that,

وَ تَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ بِهِ

be gratuitously bountiful toward me through it,

وَ أَسْعِدْنِي بِمَا تُعْطِينِي مِنْهُ

make me happy in that of it which Thou givest to me,

وَ زِدْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ

and increase me in Thy bounty

وَ سَعَةِ مَا عِنْدَكَ

and the plenty of what is with Thee,

فَإِنَّكَ وَاسِعٌ كَرِيمٌ

for Thou art Boundless, Generous!

وَ صِلْ ذَلِكَ بِخَيْرِ الْآخِرَةِ وَ نَعِيمِهَا

And link that to the good and the bliss of the next world,

يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ

O Most Merciful of the merciful!

تَدْعُو بِمَا بَدَا لَكَ، وَ تُصَلِّي عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ أَلْفَ مَرَّةٍ هَكَذَا كَانَ يَفْعَلُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ

Then you supplicate as seems proper to you and you call down blessings on Muhammed and his Household one thousand times. this is what he used to do (upon him be peace).

lines.text: اللَّهُمَّ هَذَا يَوْمٌ مُبَارَكٌ مَيْمُونٌ
O God, this is a blessed and fortunate day,
وَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ فِيهِ مُجْتَمِعُونَ فِي أَقْطَارِ أَرْضِكَ،
within which the Muslims are gathered in the quarters of Thy earth.
يَشْهَدُ السَّائِلُ مِنْهُمْ وَ الطَّالِبُ وَ الرَّاغِبُ وَ الرَّاهِبُ
Among them are present the asker, the seeker, the beseecher, the fearful,
وَ أَنْتَ النَّاظِرُ فِي حَوَائِجِهِمْ
while Thou art looking upon their needs.
فَأَسْأَلُكَ بِجُودِكَ وَ كَرَمِكَ وَ هَوَانِ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ عَلَيْكَ
So I ask Thee by Thy munificence and generosity and easy upon Thee is what I ask Thee!
أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ
- that Thou blessest Muhammad and his Household
وَ أَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْمُلْكَ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ،
And I ask Thee, O God, our Lord -for Thine is the kingdom and Thine is the praise
لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، الْحَلِيمُ الْكَرِيمُ الْحَنَّانُ الْمَنَّانُ
there is no god but Thou,the Clement, the Generous,the All-loving, the All-kind,
ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ، بَدِيعُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ،
Possessor of majesty and munificence,Originator of the heavens and the earth
، مَهْمَا قَسَمْتَ بَيْنَ عِبَادِكَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
whenever Thou apportionest among Thy faithful servants
مِنْ خَيْرٍ أَوْ عَافِيَةٍ أَوْ بَرَكَةٍ أَوْ هُدًى أَوْ عَمَلٍ بِطَاعَتِكَ
good, well being, blessing, guidance, works in obedience to Thee,
،أَوْ خَيْرٍ تَمُنُّ بِهِ عَلَيْهِمْ تَهْدِيهِمْ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ
or good through which Thou art kind to them by guiding them to Thee,
أَوْ تَرْفَعُ لَهُمْ عِنْدَكَ دَرَجَةً
or raisest them up a degree with Thee,
، أَوْ تُعْطِيهِمْ بِهِ خَيْراً مِنْ خَيْرِ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ
or givest them the good of this world or the next,
.أَنْ تُوَفِّرَ حَظِّي وَ نَصِيبِي مِنْهُ
that Thou givest me amply my share and allotment of it.
وَ أَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ بِأَنَّ
And I ask Thee, O God -
,لَكَ الْمُلْكَ وَ الْحَمْدَ
for Thine is the kingdom and the praise;
لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ
there is no god but Thou -
أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ
that Thou blessest Muhammad
عَبْدِكَ وَ رَسُولِكَ
Thy servant and Thy messenger,
وَ حَبِيبِكَ وَ صِفْوَتِكَ
Thy beloved and Thy selected friend,
,وَ خِيَرَتِكَ مِنْ خَلْقِكَ
Thy chosen from among Thy creation,
وَ عَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَبْرَارِ الطَّاهِرِينَ الْأَخْيَارِ
and the Household of Muhammad, the pious, the pure, the chosen,
,صَلَاةً لَا يَقْوَى عَلَى إِحْصَائِهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ
with a blessing no one has strength to count but Thou,
وَ أَنْ تُشْرِكَنَا فِي
that Thou associatest us with
صَالِحِ مَنْ دَعَاكَ فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ
the most righteous of those who supplicate Thee today
مِنْ عِبَادِكَ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ
of Thy faithful servants
،يَا رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ
- O Lord of the worlds!—
,وَ أَنْ تَغْفِرَ لَنَا وَ لَهُمْ
and that Thou forgivest us and them!
.إِنَّكَ عَلَى كُلِّ شَيْ‏ءٍ قَدِيرٌ
"Surely Thou art powerful over everything" (3:26).
اللَّهُمَّ إِلَيْكَ تَعَمَّدْتُ بِحَاجَتِي
O God, toward Thee I aim with my need
وَ بِكَ أَنْزَلْتُ الْيَوْمَ فَقْرِي
and before Thee today I set my poverty,
،وَ فَاقَتِي وَ مَسْكَنَتِي
my neediness, my misery,
وَ إِنِّي بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ وَ رَحْمَتِكَ أَوْثَقُ مِنِّي بِعَمَلِي
for I have more trust in Thy forgiveness and Thy mercy than in my own works.
وَ لَمَغْفِرَتُكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ أَوْسَعُ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي
Thy forgiveness and Thy mercy are vaster than my sins.
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
So bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
، وَ تَوَلَّ قَضَاءَ كُلِّ حَاجَةٍ هِيَ لِي
and attend to the accomplishment of every need of mine through
بِقُدْرَتِكَ عَلَيْهَا
Thy power over it,
، وَ تَيْسِيرِ ذَلِكَ عَلَيْكَ
its easiness for Thee,
وَ بِفَقْرِي إِلَيْكَ
my poverty toward Thee,
وَ غِنَاكَ عَنِّي
and Thy freedom from need for me!
، فَإِنِّي لَمْ أُصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلَّا مِنْكَ
I will come upon no good whatsoever unless through Thee,
، وَ لَمْ يَصْرِفْ عَنِّي سُوءاً قَطُّ أَحَدٌ غَيْرُكَ
no one other than Thou will turn any evil away from me,
وَ لَا أَرْجُو لِأَمْرِ
and I have hope in none but Thee for my affair
آخِرَتِي وَ دُنْيَايَ سِوَاكَ
in the next world and in this world.
اللَّهُمَّ مَنْ تَهَيَّأَ وَ تَعَبَّأَ
O God, if anyone has ever arranged, made ready,
وَ أَعَدَّ وَ اسْتَعَدَّ
prepared, and drawn himself up
لِوِفَادَةٍ إِلَى مَخْلُوقٍ
to be received by a creature
رَجَاءَ رِفْدِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ وَ طَلَبَ نَيْلِهِ وَ جَائِزَتِهِ
in hope of his support and awards,
فَإِلَيْكَ يَا مَوْلَايَ كَانَتِ الْيَوْمَ
then today toward Thee, my Master,
تَهْيِئَتِي وَ تَعْبِئَتِي
is my arrangement, my making ready,
وَ إِعْدَادِي وَ اسْتِعْدَادِي
my preparation, and my drawing up
رَجَاءَ عَفْوِكَ وَ رِفْدِكَ
in hope of Thy pardon and support
وَ طَلَبَ نَيْلِكَ وَ جَائِزَتِكَ
and in seeking to attain to Thee and Thy prize.
اللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
O God, so bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
وَ لَا تُخَيِّبِ الْيَوْمَ ذَلِكَ مِنْ رَجَائِي،
and disappoint not my hope in that today!
يَا مَنْ لَا يُحْفِيهِ سَائِلٌ
O He who is not troubled by those who ask
وَ لَا يَنْقُصُهُ نَائِلٌ
and diminished by those who attain their desire!
فَإِنِّي لَمْ آتِكَ ثِقَةً
I come not before Thee trusting
مِنِّي بِعَمَلٍ صَالِحٍ قَدَّمْتُهُ
in a righteous work I have sent ahead,
وَ لَا شَفَاعَةِ مَخْلُوقٍ رَجَوْتُهُ
nor in the intercession of any creature in whom I have hope,
إِلَّا شَفَاعَةَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ
except the intercession of Muhammad and the Folk of his House
عَلَيْهِ وَ عَلَيْهِمْ سَلَامُكَ
(upon him and upon them be Thy peace).
أَتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً بِالْجُرْمِ وَ الْإِسَاءَةِ إِلَى نَفْسِي
I come to Thee admitting sin and evildoing toward myself.
أَتَيْتُكَ أَرْجُو عَظِيمَ عَفْوِكَ
I come to Thee hoping for Thy abounding pardon
الَّذِي عَفَوْتَ بِهِ عَنِ الْخَاطِئِينَ
through which Thou hast pardoned the offenders,
ثُمَّ لَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلَى عَظِيمِ الْجُرْمِ
while their long persistence in dreadful sin did not prevent Thee
أَنْ عُدْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِالرَّحْمَةِ وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ
from returning toward them with mercy and forgiveness!
فَيَا مَنْ رَحْمَتُهُ وَاسِعَةٌ
O He whose mercy is wide
وَ عَفْوُهُ عَظِيمٌ
and whose pardon is abounding!
، يَا عَظِيمُ يَا عَظِيمُ
O All-mighty! O All-mighty!
يَا كَرِيمُ يَا كَرِيمُ
O All-generous! O All-generous!
صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
وَ عُدْ عَلَيَّ بِرَحْمَتِكَ
return toward me through Thy mercy,
وَ تَعَطَّفْ عَلَيَّ بِفَضْلِكَ
be tender toward me through Thy bounty,
وَ تَوَسَّعْ عَلَيَّ بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ
and spread out Thy forgiveness upon me!
. اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ هَذَا الْمَقَامَ لِخُلَفَائِكَ وَ أَصْفِيَائِكَ
O God, this station belongs to Thy vicegerents, Thy chosen,
وَ مَوَاضِعَ أُمَنَائِكَ
while the places of Thy trusted ones
فِي الدَّرَجَةِ الرَّفِيعَةِ الَّتِي اخْتَصَصْتَهُمْ بِهَا
in the elevated degree which Thou hast singled out for them
قَدِ ابْتَزُّوهَا
have been forcibly stripped!
وَ أَنْتَ الْمُقَدِّرُ لِذَلِكَ
But Thou art the Ordainer of that -
لَا يُغَالَبُ أَمْرُكَ
Thy command is not overcome,
وَ لَا يُجَاوَزُ الْمَحْتُومُ مِنْ تَدْبِيرِكَ
the inevitable in Thy governing is not overstepped!
كَيْفَ شِئْتَ وَ أَنَّى شِئْتَ
However Thou willest and whenever Thou willest!
وَ لِمَا أَنْتَ أَعْلَمُ بِهِ
In that which Thou knowest best,
غَيْرُ مُتَّهَمٍ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ وَ لَا لِإِرَادَتِكَ
Thou art not accused for Thy creation or Thy will!
حَتَّى عَادَ صِفْوَتُكَ وَ خُلَفَاؤُكَ
Then Thy selected friends, Thy vicegerents,
مَغْلُوبِينَ مَقْهُورِينَ مُبْتَزِّينَ
were overcome, vanquished, forcibly stripped;
يَرَوْنَ حُكْمَكَ مُبَدَّلًا
they see Thy decree replaced,
وَ كِتَابَكَ مَنْبُوذاً
Thy Book discarded,
، وَ فَرَائِضَكَ مُحَرَّفَةً عَنْ جِهَاتِ أَشْرَاعِكَ
Thy obligations distorted from the aims of Thy laws,
وَ سُنَنَ نَبِيِّكَ مَتْرُوكَةً
and the Sunna of Thy Prophet abandoned!
اللَّهُمَّ الْعَنْ أَعْدَاءَهُمْ مِنَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَ الْآخِرِينَ
O God, curse their enemies among those of old and the later folk,
وَ مَنْ رَضِيَ بِفِعَالِهِمْ
and all those pleased with their acts,
وَ أَشْيَاعَهُمْ وَ أَتْبَاعَهُمْ
and their adherents and followers!
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
O God, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
إِنَّكَ حَمِيدٌ مَجِيدٌ
(surely Thou art All-laudable, All-glorious)
كَصَلَوَاتِكَ وَ بَرَكَاتِكَ وَ تَحِيَّاتِكَ
like Thy blessing, benedictions, and salutations
عَلَى أَصْفِيَائِكَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ
upon Thy chosen Abraham and the people of Abraham!
وَ عَجِّلِ الْفَرَجَ
And hasten for them relief,
وَ الرَّوْحَ وَ النُّصْرَةَ وَ التَّمْكِينَ وَ التَّأْيِيدَ لَهُمْ
ease, help, strengthening,and confirmation!
اللَّهُمَّ وَ اجْعَلْنِي
O God, and make me
مِنْ أَهْلِ التَّوْحِيدِ
one of the people who profess Thy Unity,
وَ الْإِيمَانِ بِكَ
have faith in Thee,
وَ التَّصْدِيقِ بِرَسُولِكَ
and attest to Thy Messenger
وَ الْأَئِمَّةِ الَّذِينَ حَتَمْتَ طَاعَتَهُمْ
and the Imams toward whom Thou hast enjoined obedience,
مِمَّنْ يَجْرِي ذَلِكَ بِهِ وَ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ
and one of those through whom and at whose hands this takes place!
آمِينَ رَبَّ الْعَالَمِينَ
Amen, Lord of the worlds!
اللَّهُمَّ لَيْسَ يَرُدُّ غَضَبَكَ إِلَّا حِلْمُكَ
O God, nothing repels Thy wrath but Thy clemency,
، وَ لَا يَرُدُّ سَخَطَكَ إِلَّا عَفْوُكَ
nothing repels Thy displeasure but Thy pardon,
وَ لا يُجِيرُ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَتُكَ
nothing grants sanctuary from Thy punishment but Thy mercy,
وَ لَا يُنْجِينِي مِنْكَ
and nothing will deliver me from Thee
إِلَّا التَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ وَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ
except pleading to Thee before Thee,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
so bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
وَ هَبْ لَنَا يَا إِلَهِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فَرَجاً
and give us on Thy part, my God, relief
بِالْقُدْرَةِالَّتِي بِهَا تُحْيِي أَمْوَاتَ الْعِبَادِ
by means of the power through which Thou bringest the dead servants to life
وَ بِهَا تَنْشُرُ مَيْتَ الْبِلَادِ
and revivest the dead lands.
. وَ لَا تُهْلِكْنِي يَا إِلَهِي غَمّاً
Destroy me not through gloom, my God,
حَتَّى تَسْتَجِيبَ لِي
before Thou respondest to me
وَ تُعَرِّفَنِي الْإِجَابَةَ فِي دُعَائِي
and givest me the knowledge of Thy response to my supplication!
وَ أَذِقْنِي طَعْمَ الْعَافِيَةِ إِلَى مُنْتَهَى أَجَلِي
Let me taste the flavour of well-being to the end of my term!
وَ لَا تُشْمِتْ بِي عَدُوِّي
And let not my enemy gloat over me,
وَ لَا تُمَكِّنْهُ مِنْ عُنُقِي
place not my neck in his power,
وَ لَا تُسَلِّطْهُ عَلَيَّ
and give him not authority over me!
إِلَهِي إِنْ رَفَعْتَنِي
My God, if Thou raisest me up,
فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَضَعُنِي
who is there to push me down?
وَ إِنْ وَضَعْتَنِي
If Thou pushest me down,
فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَرْفَعُنِي
who is there to raise me up?
وَ إِنْ أَكْرَمْتَنِي
If Thou honourest me,
فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يُهِينُنِي
who is there to humiliate me?
وَ إِنْ أَهَنْتَنِي
If Thou humiliatest me,
فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يُكْرِمُنِي
who is there to honour me?
وَ إِنْ عَذَّبْتَنِي
If Thou chastisest me,
فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَرْحَمُنِي
who is there to have mercy upon me?
وَ إِنْ أَهْلَكْتَنِي
If Thou destroyest me,
فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ
who is there to stand up for Thy servant against Thee
أَوْ يَسْأَلُكَ عَنْ أَمْرِهِ
or ask Thee about his affair?
وَ قَدْ عَلِمْتُ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ
But I know that there is no wrong in Thy decree
وَ لَا فِي نَقِمَتِكَ عَجَلَةٌ
and no hurry in Thy vengeance.
وَ إِنَّمَا يَعْجَلُ مَنْ يَخَافُ الْفَوْتَ
He alone hurries who fears to miss,
وَ إِنَّمَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى الظُّلْمِ الضَّعِيفُ
and only the weak needs to wrong.
وَ قَدْ تَعَالَيْتَ يَا إِلَهِي
But Thou art exalted, my God,
عَنْ ذَلِكَ عُلُوّاً كَبِيراً
high indeed above all that!
اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ
O God, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
وَ لَا تَجْعَلْنِي لِلْبَلَاءِ غَرَضاً
make me not the target of affliction
، وَ لَا لِنَقِمَتِكَ نَصَباً
nor the object of Thy vengeance,
وَ مَهِّلْنِي، وَ نَفِّسْنِي
respite me, comfort me,
وَ أَقِلْنِي عَثْرَتِي
release me from my stumble,
وَ لَا تَبْتَلِيَنِّي بِبَلَاءٍ
and afflict me not with an affliction
عَلَى أَثَرِ بَلَاءٍ
in the wake of an affliction,
فَقَدْ تَرَى ضَعْفِي
for Thou hast seen my frailty,
وَ قِلَّةَ حِيلَتِي
the paucity of my stratagems,
وَ تَضَرُّعِي إِلَيْكَ
and my pleading to Thee!
أَعُوذُ بِكَ اللَّهُمَّ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ
I seek refuge in Thee today, my God, from Thy wrath,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَعِذْنِي.
so bless Muhammad and his Household and give me refuge!
، وَ أَسْتَجِيرُ بِكَ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ
I seek sanctuary in Thee today from Thy displeasure,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَجِرْنِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household, and give me sanctuary!
وَ أَسْأَلُكَ أَمْناً مِنْ عَذَابِكَ
I ask Thee security from Thy chastisement,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ آمِنِّي
so bless Muhammad and his Household, and give me security!
وَ أَسْتَهْدِيكَ
I seek guidance from Thee,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ اهْدِنِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and guide me!
وَ أَسْتَنْصِرُكَ
I seek help from Thee,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ انْصُرْنِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and help me!
وَ أَسْتَرْحِمُكَ
I ask Thee for mercy,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ ارْحَمْنِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and have mercy upon me!
وَ أَسْتَكْفِيكَ
I seek sufficiency from Thee,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اكْفِنِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and suffice me!
وَ أَسْتَرْزِقُكَ
I seek provision from Thee,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ ارْزُقْنِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and provide for me!
وَ أَسْتَعِينُكَ
I seek assistance from Thee,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَعِنِّي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and assist me!
وَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا سَلَفَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي
I pray forgiveness for my past sins,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اغْفِرْ لِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and forgive me!
وَ أَسْتَعْصِمُكَ
I ask Thee to preserve me from sin,
فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اعْصِمْنِي
so bless Muhammad and his Household and preserve me,
فَإِنِّي لَنْ أَعُودَ لِشَيْ‏ءٍ كَرِهْتَهُ مِنِّي إِنْ شِئْتَ ذَلِكَ
for I will not return to anything Thou dislikest from me, if Thou willest that!
يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ، يَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ
My Lord! My Lord! O All-loving! O All-kind!
يَا ذَا الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ
O Possessor of majesty and munificence!
صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ
Bless Muhammad and his Household,
وَ اسْتَجِبْ لِي جَمِيعَ
and grant me everything
مَا سَأَلْتُكَ وَ طَلَبْتُ إِلَيْكَ
that I ask from Thee, seek from Thee,
وَ رَغِبْتُ فِيهِ إِلَيْكَ
and beseech from Thee!
وَ أَرِدْهُ وَ قَدِّرْهُ وَ اقْضِهِ وَ أَمْضِهِ
Will it, ordain it, decree it, and accomplish it!
وَ خِرْ لِي فِيمَا تَقْضِي مِنْه
Give me good in that of it which Thou decreest!
وَ بَارِكْ لِي فِي ذَلِكَ
Bless me in that,
وَ تَفَضَّلْ عَلَيَّ بِهِ
be gratuitously bountiful toward me through it,
وَ أَسْعِدْنِي بِمَا تُعْطِينِي مِنْهُ
make me happy in that of it which Thou givest to me,
وَ زِدْنِي مِنْ فَضْلِكَ
and increase me in Thy bounty
وَ سَعَةِ مَا عِنْدَكَ
and the plenty of what is with Thee,
فَإِنَّكَ وَاسِعٌ كَرِيمٌ
for Thou art Boundless, Generous!
وَ صِلْ ذَلِكَ بِخَيْرِ الْآخِرَةِ وَ نَعِيمِهَا
And link that to the good and the bliss of the next world,
يَا أَرْحَمَ الرَّاحِمِينَ
O Most Merciful of the merciful!
تَدْعُو بِمَا بَدَا لَكَ، وَ تُصَلِّي عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ أَلْفَ مَرَّةٍ هَكَذَا كَانَ يَفْعَلُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ
Then you supplicate as seems proper to you and you call down blessings on Muhammed and his Household one thousand times. this is what he used to do (upon him be peace).

translations.text: O God, this is a blessed and fortunate day,

pairs.arabic: وَ الْمُسْلِمُونَ فِيهِ مُجْتَمِعُونَ فِي أَقْطَارِ أَرْضِكَ،

translations.text: within which the Muslims are gathered in the quarters of Thy earth.

pairs.arabic: يَشْهَدُ السَّائِلُ مِنْهُمْ وَ الطَّالِبُ وَ الرَّاغِبُ وَ الرَّاهِبُ

translations.text: Among them are present the asker, the seeker, the beseecher, the fearful,
while Thou art looking upon their needs.

pairs.arabic: فَأَسْأَلُكَ بِجُودِكَ وَ كَرَمِكَ وَ هَوَانِ مَا سَأَلْتُكَ عَلَيْكَ

translations.text: So I ask Thee by Thy munificence and generosity and easy upon Thee is what I ask Thee!

pairs.arabic: أَنْ تُصَلِّيَ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ

translations.text: - that Thou blessest Muhammad and his Household

pairs.arabic: وَ أَسْأَلُكَ اللَّهُمَّ رَبَّنَا بِأَنَّ لَكَ الْمُلْكَ وَ لَكَ الْحَمْدَ،

translations.text: And I ask Thee, O God, our Lord -for Thine is the kingdom and Thine is the praise

pairs.arabic: لَا إِلَهَ إِلَّا أَنْتَ، الْحَلِيمُ الْكَرِيمُ الْحَنَّانُ الْمَنَّانُ

translations.text: there is no god but Thou,the Clement, the Generous,the All-loving, the All-kind,

pairs.arabic: ذُو الْجَلَالِ وَ الْإِكْرَامِ، بَدِيعُ السَّمَاوَاتِ وَ الْأَرْضِ،

translations.text: Possessor of majesty and munificence,Originator of the heavens and the earth
whenever Thou apportionest among Thy faithful servants

pairs.arabic: مِنْ خَيْرٍ أَوْ عَافِيَةٍ أَوْ بَرَكَةٍ أَوْ هُدًى أَوْ عَمَلٍ بِطَاعَتِكَ

translations.text: good, well being, blessing, guidance, works in obedience to Thee,

pairs.arabic: ،أَوْ خَيْرٍ تَمُنُّ بِهِ عَلَيْهِمْ تَهْدِيهِمْ بِهِ إِلَيْكَ

translations.text: or good through which Thou art kind to them by guiding them to Thee,
or raisest them up a degree with Thee,

pairs.arabic: ، أَوْ تُعْطِيهِمْ بِهِ خَيْراً مِنْ خَيْرِ الدُّنْيَا وَ الْآخِرَةِ

translations.text: or givest them the good of this world or the next,
that Thou givest me amply my share and allotment of it.
And I ask Thee, O God -
for Thine is the kingdom and the praise;
there is no god but Thou -
that Thou blessest Muhammad
Thy servant and Thy messenger,
Thy beloved and Thy selected friend,
Thy chosen from among Thy creation,

pairs.arabic: وَ عَلَى آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ الْأَبْرَارِ الطَّاهِرِينَ الْأَخْيَارِ

translations.text: and the Household of Muhammad, the pious, the pure, the chosen,

pairs.arabic: ,صَلَاةً لَا يَقْوَى عَلَى إِحْصَائِهَا إِلَّا أَنْتَ

translations.text: with a blessing no one has strength to count but Thou,
that Thou associatest us with

pairs.arabic: صَالِحِ مَنْ دَعَاكَ فِي هَذَا الْيَوْمِ

translations.text: the most righteous of those who supplicate Thee today
of Thy faithful servants
- O Lord of the worlds!—
and that Thou forgivest us and them!
"Surely Thou art powerful over everything" (3:26).
O God, toward Thee I aim with my need
and before Thee today I set my poverty,
my neediness, my misery,

pairs.arabic: وَ إِنِّي بِمَغْفِرَتِكَ وَ رَحْمَتِكَ أَوْثَقُ مِنِّي بِعَمَلِي

translations.text: for I have more trust in Thy forgiveness and Thy mercy than in my own works.

pairs.arabic: وَ لَمَغْفِرَتُكَ وَ رَحْمَتُكَ أَوْسَعُ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي

translations.text: Thy forgiveness and Thy mercy are vaster than my sins.

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translations.text: So bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

pairs.arabic: ، وَ تَوَلَّ قَضَاءَ كُلِّ حَاجَةٍ هِيَ لِي

translations.text: and attend to the accomplishment of every need of mine through
Thy power over it,
its easiness for Thee,
my poverty toward Thee,
and Thy freedom from need for me!

pairs.arabic: ، فَإِنِّي لَمْ أُصِبْ خَيْراً قَطُّ إِلَّا مِنْكَ

translations.text: I will come upon no good whatsoever unless through Thee,

pairs.arabic: ، وَ لَمْ يَصْرِفْ عَنِّي سُوءاً قَطُّ أَحَدٌ غَيْرُكَ

translations.text: no one other than Thou will turn any evil away from me,
and I have hope in none but Thee for my affair
in the next world and in this world.
O God, if anyone has ever arranged, made ready,
prepared, and drawn himself up
to be received by a creature

pairs.arabic: رَجَاءَ رِفْدِهِ وَ نَوَافِلِهِ وَ طَلَبَ نَيْلِهِ وَ جَائِزَتِهِ

translations.text: in hope of his support and awards,
then today toward Thee, my Master,
is my arrangement, my making ready,
my preparation, and my drawing up
in hope of Thy pardon and support
and in seeking to attain to Thee and Thy prize.

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translations.text: O God, so bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad

pairs.arabic: وَ لَا تُخَيِّبِ الْيَوْمَ ذَلِكَ مِنْ رَجَائِي،

translations.text: and disappoint not my hope in that today!
O He who is not troubled by those who ask
and diminished by those who attain their desire!
I come not before Thee trusting
in a righteous work I have sent ahead,
nor in the intercession of any creature in whom I have hope,

pairs.arabic: إِلَّا شَفَاعَةَ مُحَمَّدٍ وَ أَهْلِ بَيْتِهِ

translations.text: except the intercession of Muhammad and the Folk of his House
(upon him and upon them be Thy peace).

pairs.arabic: أَتَيْتُكَ مُقِرّاً بِالْجُرْمِ وَ الْإِسَاءَةِ إِلَى نَفْسِي

translations.text: I come to Thee admitting sin and evildoing toward myself.
I come to Thee hoping for Thy abounding pardon
through which Thou hast pardoned the offenders,

pairs.arabic: ثُمَّ لَمْ يَمْنَعْكَ طُولُ عُكُوفِهِمْ عَلَى عَظِيمِ الْجُرْمِ

translations.text: while their long persistence in dreadful sin did not prevent Thee

pairs.arabic: أَنْ عُدْتَ عَلَيْهِمْ بِالرَّحْمَةِ وَ الْمَغْفِرَةِ

translations.text: from returning toward them with mercy and forgiveness!
O He whose mercy is wide
and whose pardon is abounding!
O All-mighty! O All-mighty!
O All-generous! O All-generous!

pairs.arabic: صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translations.text: Bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
return toward me through Thy mercy,
be tender toward me through Thy bounty,
and spread out Thy forgiveness upon me!

pairs.arabic: . اللَّهُمَّ إِنَّ هَذَا الْمَقَامَ لِخُلَفَائِكَ وَ أَصْفِيَائِكَ

translations.text: O God, this station belongs to Thy vicegerents, Thy chosen,
while the places of Thy trusted ones

pairs.arabic: فِي الدَّرَجَةِ الرَّفِيعَةِ الَّتِي اخْتَصَصْتَهُمْ بِهَا

translations.text: in the elevated degree which Thou hast singled out for them
have been forcibly stripped!
But Thou art the Ordainer of that -
Thy command is not overcome,

pairs.arabic: وَ لَا يُجَاوَزُ الْمَحْتُومُ مِنْ تَدْبِيرِكَ

translations.text: the inevitable in Thy governing is not overstepped!
However Thou willest and whenever Thou willest!
In that which Thou knowest best,

pairs.arabic: غَيْرُ مُتَّهَمٍ عَلَى خَلْقِكَ وَ لَا لِإِرَادَتِكَ

translations.text: Thou art not accused for Thy creation or Thy will!
Then Thy selected friends, Thy vicegerents,
were overcome, vanquished, forcibly stripped;
they see Thy decree replaced,
Thy Book discarded,

pairs.arabic: ، وَ فَرَائِضَكَ مُحَرَّفَةً عَنْ جِهَاتِ أَشْرَاعِكَ

translations.text: Thy obligations distorted from the aims of Thy laws,
and the Sunna of Thy Prophet abandoned!

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ الْعَنْ أَعْدَاءَهُمْ مِنَ الْأَوَّلِينَ وَ الْآخِرِينَ

translations.text: O God, curse their enemies among those of old and the later folk,
and all those pleased with their acts,
and their adherents and followers!

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad
(surely Thou art All-laudable, All-glorious)
like Thy blessing, benedictions, and salutations

pairs.arabic: عَلَى أَصْفِيَائِكَ إِبْرَاهِيمَ وَ آلِ إِبْرَاهِيمَ

translations.text: upon Thy chosen Abraham and the people of Abraham!
And hasten for them relief,

pairs.arabic: وَ الرَّوْحَ وَ النُّصْرَةَ وَ التَّمْكِينَ وَ التَّأْيِيدَ لَهُمْ

translations.text: ease, help, strengthening,and confirmation!
O God, and make me
one of the people who profess Thy Unity,
have faith in Thee,
and attest to Thy Messenger
and the Imams toward whom Thou hast enjoined obedience,

pairs.arabic: مِمَّنْ يَجْرِي ذَلِكَ بِهِ وَ عَلَى يَدَيْهِ

translations.text: and one of those through whom and at whose hands this takes place!
Amen, Lord of the worlds!

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ لَيْسَ يَرُدُّ غَضَبَكَ إِلَّا حِلْمُكَ

translations.text: O God, nothing repels Thy wrath but Thy clemency,

pairs.arabic: ، وَ لَا يَرُدُّ سَخَطَكَ إِلَّا عَفْوُكَ

translations.text: nothing repels Thy displeasure but Thy pardon,

pairs.arabic: وَ لا يُجِيرُ مِنْ عِقَابِكَ إِلَّا رَحْمَتُكَ

translations.text: nothing grants sanctuary from Thy punishment but Thy mercy,
and nothing will deliver me from Thee

pairs.arabic: إِلَّا التَّضَرُّعُ إِلَيْكَ وَ بَيْنَ يَدَيْكَ

translations.text: except pleading to Thee before Thee,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,

pairs.arabic: وَ هَبْ لَنَا يَا إِلَهِي مِنْ لَدُنْكَ فَرَجاً

translations.text: and give us on Thy part, my God, relief
by means of the power through which Thou bringest the dead servants to life
and revivest the dead lands.

pairs.arabic: . وَ لَا تُهْلِكْنِي يَا إِلَهِي غَمّاً

translations.text: Destroy me not through gloom, my God,
before Thou respondest to me
and givest me the knowledge of Thy response to my supplication!

pairs.arabic: وَ أَذِقْنِي طَعْمَ الْعَافِيَةِ إِلَى مُنْتَهَى أَجَلِي

translations.text: Let me taste the flavour of well-being to the end of my term!
And let not my enemy gloat over me,
place not my neck in his power,
and give him not authority over me!
My God, if Thou raisest me up,
who is there to push me down?
If Thou pushest me down,
who is there to raise me up?
If Thou honourest me,
who is there to humiliate me?
If Thou humiliatest me,
who is there to honour me?
If Thou chastisest me,
who is there to have mercy upon me?
If Thou destroyest me,

pairs.arabic: فَمَنْ ذَا الَّذِي يَعْرِضُ لَكَ فِي عَبْدِكَ

translations.text: who is there to stand up for Thy servant against Thee
or ask Thee about his affair?

pairs.arabic: وَ قَدْ عَلِمْتُ أَنَّهُ لَيْسَ فِي حُكْمِكَ ظُلْمٌ

translations.text: But I know that there is no wrong in Thy decree
and no hurry in Thy vengeance.

pairs.arabic: وَ إِنَّمَا يَعْجَلُ مَنْ يَخَافُ الْفَوْتَ

translations.text: He alone hurries who fears to miss,

pairs.arabic: وَ إِنَّمَا يَحْتَاجُ إِلَى الظُّلْمِ الضَّعِيفُ

translations.text: and only the weak needs to wrong.
But Thou art exalted, my God,
high indeed above all that!

pairs.arabic: اللَّهُمَّ صَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِ مُحَمَّدٍ

translations.text: O God, bless Muhammad and the Household of Muhammad,
make me not the target of affliction
nor the object of Thy vengeance,
respite me, comfort me,
release me from my stumble,
and afflict me not with an affliction
in the wake of an affliction,
for Thou hast seen my frailty,
the paucity of my stratagems,
and my pleading to Thee!

pairs.arabic: أَعُوذُ بِكَ اللَّهُمَّ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ غَضَبِكَ

translations.text: I seek refuge in Thee today, my God, from Thy wrath,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَعِذْنِي.

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and give me refuge!

pairs.arabic: ، وَ أَسْتَجِيرُ بِكَ الْيَوْمَ مِنْ سَخَطِكَ

translations.text: I seek sanctuary in Thee today from Thy displeasure,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَجِرْنِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household, and give me sanctuary!
I ask Thee security from Thy chastisement,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ آمِنِّي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household, and give me security!
I seek guidance from Thee,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ اهْدِنِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and guide me!
I seek help from Thee,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ انْصُرْنِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and help me!
I ask Thee for mercy,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ ارْحَمْنِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and have mercy upon me!
I seek sufficiency from Thee,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اكْفِنِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and suffice me!
I seek provision from Thee,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ ارْزُقْنِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and provide for me!
I seek assistance from Thee,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ وَ أَعِنِّي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and assist me!

pairs.arabic: وَ أَسْتَغْفِرُكَ لِمَا سَلَفَ مِنْ ذُنُوبِي

translations.text: I pray forgiveness for my past sins,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اغْفِرْ لِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and forgive me!
I ask Thee to preserve me from sin,

pairs.arabic: فَصَلِّ عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ، وَ اعْصِمْنِي

translations.text: so bless Muhammad and his Household and preserve me,

pairs.arabic: فَإِنِّي لَنْ أَعُودَ لِشَيْ‏ءٍ كَرِهْتَهُ مِنِّي إِنْ شِئْتَ ذَلِكَ

translations.text: for I will not return to anything Thou dislikest from me, if Thou willest that!

pairs.arabic: يَا رَبِّ يَا رَبِّ، يَا حَنَّانُ يَا مَنَّانُ

translations.text: My Lord! My Lord! O All-loving! O All-kind!
O Possessor of majesty and munificence!
Bless Muhammad and his Household,
and grant me everything
that I ask from Thee, seek from Thee,
and beseech from Thee!

pairs.arabic: وَ أَرِدْهُ وَ قَدِّرْهُ وَ اقْضِهِ وَ أَمْضِهِ

translations.text: Will it, ordain it, decree it, and accomplish it!

pairs.arabic: وَ خِرْ لِي فِيمَا تَقْضِي مِنْه

translations.text: Give me good in that of it which Thou decreest!
Bless me in that,
be gratuitously bountiful toward me through it,
make me happy in that of it which Thou givest to me,
and increase me in Thy bounty
and the plenty of what is with Thee,
for Thou art Boundless, Generous!

pairs.arabic: وَ صِلْ ذَلِكَ بِخَيْرِ الْآخِرَةِ وَ نَعِيمِهَا

translations.text: And link that to the good and the bliss of the next world,
O Most Merciful of the merciful!

pairs.arabic: تَدْعُو بِمَا بَدَا لَكَ، وَ تُصَلِّي عَلَى مُحَمَّدٍ وَ آلِهِ أَلْفَ مَرَّةٍ هَكَذَا كَانَ يَفْعَلُ عَلَيْهِ السَّلَامُ

translations.text: Then you supplicate as seems proper to you and you call down blessings on Muhammed and his Household one thousand times. this is what he used to do (upon him be peace).
